name: HK2NY: Hong Kong to New York - Backpacking Documentary Series
original_name: HK2NY: Hong Kong to New York - Backpacking Documentary Series
overview: Ever wanted to quit your job and go travelling round the world? Well James and Karl did and filmed it all. The backpacking documentary follows James and Karl as they travel through 20 countries in 4 continents over 9 months, covering a distance of over 42,000 miles.  ​
